85d0ac0f157b.name: Donny Burger
85d0ac0f157b.description:
Donny Burger is a potent cross of GMO x Han Solo Burger, delivering bold flavor and full-bodied effects. This indica offers an immediate uplifted mood paired with smooth physical relaxation, creating a balanced yet deeply calming experience.

Its terpene profile is rich and savory, blending spicy pepper, cheesy funk, earthy anise, and tangy citrus undertones. The aroma leans pungent and gassy with hints of black licorice and sour citrus.

Oversized neon-green buds feature bright orange hairs and a thick coating of frosty golden-white trichomes.

sw388031.name: Barnyard High Test
sw388031.description:
Barnyard High Test is a potent hybrid bred from Chem Dog Funk x Auto Varin Lime Sour. True to its name, this strain delivers a bold, musky aroma layered with fuel-forward notes, burned rubber, and subtle sour citrus undertones.

Known for its high total cannabinoid content, Barnyard High Test offers a strong, full-spectrum experience suited for seasoned consumers. The profile leans gassy and earthy, making it a standout for those who appreciate classic funk-driven strains with intensity and depth.

A powerful option for customers seeking robust flavor and elevated potency.

sw388044.name: Orange Runtz
sw388044.description:
Orange Runtz is a vibrant cross of African Orange x Runtz, delivering bright citrus flavor with energetic, social effects. This sativa-leaning hybrid hits quickly, offering focused motivation and an uplifting, euphoric headspace paired with light body ease.

Its terpene profile features sweet orange candy layered with hints of banana and fresh fruit. The aroma mirrors its sugary citrus character with a subtle sour twist.

Dense dark olive-green buds showcase purple undertones, bright orange hairs, and a frosty coating of white trichomes.

sw388049.name: Tropicana Cherry
sw388049.description:
Tropicana Cherry is a vibrant cross of Tropicana Cookies x Cherry Cookies, delivering bold fruit-forward flavor with energetic effects. This sativa-leaning hybrid offers an uplifting cerebral boost paired with smooth, balanced body ease.

Its terpene profile blends sweet and sour citrus with ripe cherry and subtle earthy nuttiness. The aroma leans sharp and citrus-forward with a bright, tangy finish.

Oversized forest-green buds showcase purple undertones, amber hairs, and a frosty coating of white trichomes.
